description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a metallic head and a two-tone handle. The head is made of steel, with one side presenting a flat striking face for driving nails and the opposite side forming a curved claw for prying and nail removal. The handle is straight, primarily yellow with a black rubberized grip at the end, designed for comfort and slip resistance. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with the head securely mounted onto the handle. The hammer's overall proportions suggest it is suitable for general carpentry and household tasks. The surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A steel claw hammer with a yellow and black straight handle and a curved claw for nail removal. The handle features a rubberized grip for comfort and control.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the hammer, with the handle and the tip of the claw visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the hammer, the flat striking face, and the curved claw clearly.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the black rubberized grip and the split claw at the head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle and the hammer head, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Straight fiberglass handle with a black rubberized ergonomic grip, designed for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Steel claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for prying nails.
